title: Implement #1250 decision traceability owner model

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1250 by defining and testing the decision traceability owner split across closeout_report.decision_review and decision_pressure.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep decision_pressure routing-only; do not make AW infer semantic decisions from diffs, file names, or changed surfaces; do not build a new ADR subsystem.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact owner-model packet wording, proportional absence policy, durable target descriptions, and representative tests.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The slice requires new durable storage, broad historical migration, or changes outside closeout_report/decision_pressure contracts.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement owner-model packets and focused tests, then run AW-selected proof.
completion_criteria: closeout_report.decision_review exposes the agent/AW/host owner split for present, missing, and not-applicable decisions.
decision_pressure exposes the same owner split while remaining routing-only.
Configured and unconfigured durable targets are represented without requiring a formal ADR system for small work.
Tests prove small work remains decision-light and system-shaping absence remains visible and routed.
